g.text: ✓ Input shape can become MORE permissive (fixed → variable)
✗ Input dimensions cannot SHRINK (breaks existing clients)

div.p: Clients send 224×224 images. New model expects 256×256. Deployment BLOCKED.

p.strong: Input shape now accepts variable batch:

div.p: New model is MORE permissive. Existing 224×224 inputs still work. Deployment ALLOWED.
